| 1 | BENE_ID | CCW Encrypted Beneficiary ID Number | 

 | 2 | MEDPAR_ID | MEDPAR ID Number |

 | 5 | BENE_IDENT_CD | BIC reported on first claim included in stay |

 | 7 | BENE_AGE_CNT | Age as of Date of Admission | 

 | 8 | BENE_SEX_CD | Sex of Beneficiary |
